title: The World Turns on a Clan
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, World Government, Gerd, Unknown person #5, Children, Unknown person #6 as The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.
scene: The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.

dialogue.speaker: World Government
dialogue.text: Navy ships from the world government???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's right, they've surrounded the whole island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Are they searching for some vile criminal?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If they don't resist, just capture them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lieutenant Commander! What exactly is the goal of this operation?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a training exercise! Now zip it! You're ten years too early to be questioning orders, cadet!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Squad Leader!! What's the deal with this upstart?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: My apologies! He's still in training!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't question it! There's not room for personal doubts when following military orders!

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: Just FOCUS ON COMPLETING THE MISSION!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's okay... Tranquilizer rounds shouldn't kill anyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MARTINE MONKEY D. DRAGON (future supreme commander of the revolutionary army) father of luffy

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: (future Supreme Commander of the Revolutionary Army) Father of Luffy

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry. If you let me detain you, I won't shoot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I dunno what's goin' on, but I'm leavin' this island! Outta the way!

summary: This part advances the A Hunted Bloodline through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
